column1: Suit 4: THE SELF (Hexagram \✡) — The 39-Year Desert Cycle
This suit organizes your timeline into 13 distinct phases of 3 years each. By adding the specific locations and language transitions, we map the movement of the "Starfish" across the global grid.

column5: The Origin. Born into the "Silver" land.
The Move. First contact with the Source.
The Return. Back to Argentina; re-anchoring.
Math Olympiads. The shift into abstract geometry.
Bar Mitzvah. Rejecting religion to find the Source.
The Physics. Moving to Israel; Math/Physics logic.
